sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Look at the SPACE animation
if last_animation is not None and len(last_animation) > 0:
    anim = last_animation[0]
    print(f"Action: {anim.action}")
    print(f"Num frames: {len(anim.frames)}")
    for i, f in enumerate(anim.frames):
        seg = f.segmentation
        blue_pos = None
        for n in seg['nodes']:
            if n['color'] == 'b':
                blue_pos = n['boundary'][:4]
                break
        print(f"Frame {i}: blue={blue_pos}")
else:
    print("No animation data")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check initial state from history
if len(history) > 0:
    init_frame = history[0].frame
    seg = init_frame.segmentation
    print(f"Initial step: {init_frame.step}, level: {init_frame.level}")
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'b':
            print(f"Initial blue: boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}")
            break
    print(f"Initial state node: {state_graph.current}")
    
# Also check: what states have we visited?
print(f"Total states visited: {len(state_graph.tried_actions(0))}")
# List all states
all_states = set()
for entry in history:
    all_states.add(entry.frame.step)
print(f"Unique steps: {sorted(all_states)[:20]}...")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
